options.name: --commands
options.description:
| The commands to be executed                                                                        | Required
Format: "[{command}][|{arguments}]"...
Values can be injected by position with {number}
If no command is specified, the argument is sent to standard output
Use command ">> {file path}" to append to file
Use command "> {file path}" to write to file

options.name: --batch-separation
options.description:
| Specifies how batches are separated:                                                               | Default: command-line
[c]ommand-line, [n]ew-line, [w]indows-new-line, [u]nix-new-line, [p]ipe, [s]emi-colon, comma

options.name: --batches
options.description:
| The batches to be passed for each command                                                          | Default: [none]
Each batch can contain multiple values separated by the batch value separator

options.name: --batches-files
options.description: | A list of files containing batches                                                                 | Default: [none]

options.name: --batches-stdin
options.description:
| Indicates that batches should be read from standard input
| --if                    | A condition for each batch to check if it should run                                               | Default: [none]
Format: [StringComparison:]{lhs} {operator} {rhs}
lhs and rhs can be injected by position with {number}
operators: == equals, |< starts with, >| ends with, >< contains
negations: != not equals, !< not starts with, >! not ends with, <> not contains
StringComparison: O Ordinal, OI OrdinalIgnoreCase, C CurrentCulture,
CI CurrentCultureIgnoreCase, I InvariantCulture, II InvariantCultureIgnoreCase

options.name: --root-directory
options.description: | The directory to search for projects                                                               | Default: Current directory

options.name: --execution-order
options.description:
| Specifies whether all commands are executed for the first [b]atch before moving to the next batch  | Default: batch
or the first [c]ommand is executed for all batches before moving to the next command
- Finish first [b]atch first
- Finish first [c]ommand first

options.name: --max-parallelism
options.description:
| The degree of parallel execution (1-4)                                                             | Default: 1
Specify "all" for number of cores.

options.name: --parallelize
options.description: | Specifies whether commands or batches run in parallel: [c]ommands, [b]atches                       | Default: commands

options.name: --file-encoding
options.description: | The name of the encoding e.g. utf-8, utf-16/unicode.                                               | Default: utf-8

arguments.name: OUTPUT_PATH
arguments.description: | The file path to redirect output for commands that do not specify a file path or a program to run. | Default: [none]
